title: Bureau of National Statistics of the Republic of Kazakhstan
summary: Committee on Statistics of Ministry of National Economy of the Republic of Kazakhstan (Kazakh: Қазақстан Республикасы Ұлттық экономика министрлігі Статистика комитеті, romanized: Qazaqstan Respublikasy Ūlttyq ekonomika ministrlıgı Statistika komitetı; Russian: Комитет по статистике Министерство национальной экономики Республики Казахстан) is the empowered structure, forming and realizing State policy in the field of statistics, work out and implement programs to perfect the statistics in the Republic of Kazakhstan.
text:
Committee on Statistics of Ministry of National Economy of the Republic of Kazakhstan (Kazakh: Қазақстан Республикасы Ұлттық экономика министрлігі Статистика комитеті, romanized: Qazaqstan Respublikasy Ūlttyq ekonomika ministrlıgı Statistika komitetı; Russian: Комитет по статистике Министерство национальной экономики Республики Казахстан) is the empowered structure, forming and realizing State policy in the field of statistics, work out and implement programs to perfect the statistics in the Republic of Kazakhstan.

Functions and goals
The main objectives are as follows:

formating of statistical methodology;
implementation of statistical activities in compliance with the principles of state statistics;
meet the needs of society, government, and the international community in official statistics.

History
Structure
Head and names
Subordinate organizations
The Republican State Enterprise "Information and Computing Center of the Agency of the Republic of Kazakhstan on Statistics" is subordinate to the Agency of the Republic of Kazakhstan on Statistics.
